prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-MSFEW-C-ORNG-6PC-IR-TT Product Type: SPORTING_GOODS Brand (from catalog): ToolTreaux Existing Title: ToolTreaux Safety Lightweight Loud Floating Emergency Whistle - 6 Pack Description: The ToolTreaux lightweight floating whistles make a loud noise to bring everyone's attention in the event of an emergency.

These whistles are constructed of durable, high-quality plastic that won't rust or corrode, unlike common metal-based whistles. Plastic is a great material for emergency whistles because it's lightweight, waterproof, and will stand the test of time, rain, or shine.

The lightweight plastic whistles easily float in water and the bright orange color will help you locate them during an emergency in case you drop them in the water. These are ideal plastic whistles for construction workers and outdoor adventurers alike.

Our unique design features a clip-on attachment so you can easily affix the whistle to your life jacket, backpack, pocket, or belt. The plastic whistles come with a lanyard hole as well so you can use them as a keychain. They each measure 2" x .5" x .5" and weigh just .16 ounces. Make sure to grab a set of these in case of an emergency. Search Terms: floating whistle powerful signal compact pea-less lightweight design lanyard emergency situation outdoor survival safety running extra loud camping hiking hunting rescue kayaking shrill blast kayak jacket fishing boat kids lifeguard plastic Features: - HIGH-QUALITY CONSTRUCTION - ToolTreaux survival kit whistles are made of durable, high-quality plastic that won't rust, unlike common metal-based whistles. Plastic is a great material for emergency whistles because it's super-lightweight, waterproof, and will stand the test of time - SUPER LOUD WHISTLE - Our waterproof whistles blast a loud noise when blown in order to draw everyone's attention in case of an emergency. The high-pitched sound can be heard from a long distance, making this an essential safety whistle. - HIGH VISIBILITY, DESIGNED TO FLOAT - The lightweight whistles easily float in water and the bright orange color will help you locate the whistle during an emergency in case you drop it in the water. These are ideal plastic whistles for construction workers and outdoor adventurers. - KEY CHAIN CLIP - Our unique design features a clip-on attachment so you can easily affix it to your life jacket, backpack, pocket or belt. The plastic whistle comes with a lanyard hole as well so you can use it as a keychain! - SPECIFICATIONS - Adjustable lanyard and clip on attachment; High visibility orange color; Floats in water; Dimensions: 2" x .5" x .5"; Weight: .01lbs or .16oz (lightweight) === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.title_differentiation: Super Loud, Floats In Water, High Visibility Orange, Lightweight Plastic, Clip And Lanyard Attachment

openai.title_differentiation: 6 Pack, Floating Design, Extra Loud Signal, Rustproof Plastic, Clip On Attachment, Lanyard Hole, Bright Orange
